key_risks: Hot May payrolls June 5 could spike yields and hit high-multiple tech
Crowded momentum trade vulnerable to factor reversal
Oil at $93+ and PPI 6% YoY signal inflation reacceleration pressuring growth multiples
Consumer sentiment collapse (44.8) could trigger broader risk-off

portfolio.rationale: Strong momentum, AI capex acceleration, SIA Q1 sales +25% QoQ, Taiwan/Korea strength corroborates.
Best trailing momentum (+11.65% 7d, +37% 30d) with strong secular AI security spend tailwind.
Broad tech leadership intact; ISM new orders strong, AI spending forecast +47% YoY.
Factor riding tech/semis leadership; low VIX 16 supports trend persistence.
Hedge against sticky inflation (CPI 3.8%, PPI 6.0%) and weak dollar.

portfolio_rationale: Tilt to AI/semis/cyber momentum cluster which dominates trailing returns with strong fundamental tailwinds (SIA, Gartner AI spend). Small gold hedge against inflation re-acceleration shown in April CPI/PPI prints.
rationale_summary: Concentrated in leading momentum themes (semis, cybersecurity, tech, momentum factor) with a gold hedge against sticky inflation risk ahead of May payrolls Friday.
